# MTC Renovations
> Burlington & Hamilton's trusted renovation contractor

## About
MTC Renovations is a licensed, insured residential renovation contractor serving Burlington, Hamilton, Oakville, and the Greater Toronto Area. We specialize in basement finishing, kitchen renovation, bathroom remodeling, flooring installation, and interior painting.

## Services
- Basement Renovation (finishing, legal suites, waterproofing)
- Bathroom Renovation (walk-in showers, tile, vanities, full remodels)
- Kitchen Renovation (cabinets, countertops, open-concept conversions)
- Flooring Installation (hardwood, luxury vinyl plank, tile)
- Interior Painting (residential, clean prep, premium paint)

## Service Area
Burlington, Hamilton, Oakville, Stoney Creek, Ancaster, Dundas, Waterdown, Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Grimsby, Milton, and surrounding GTA communities.

## Contact
- Phone: (647) 560-1095
- Email: info@mtcrenovations.ca
- Website: https://mtcrenovations.ca
- Quote: https://mtcrenovations.ca/basement/get-free-quote/

## Key Facts
- Licensed and insured with full WSIB coverage
- Fixed-price quotes with no hidden fees
- 50+ five-star Google reviews
- Serving Ontario homeowners
